mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.EtcOrgCodeMapper.selectByPageCnt */ select count(a.org_cd) from t_etc_org_code a where 1=1
mapper.insert:
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.EtcOrgCodeMapper.insertBatch */ INSERT INTO t_etc_org_code (org_cd, full_nm, low_nm) VALUES
(#{item.orgCd}, #{item.fullNm}, #{item.lowNm})
